name: Permianville Royalty Trust
business: Permianville Royalty Trust holds a Net Profits Interest entitling it to 80% of the net profits from oil and natural gas production from underlying properties in Texas, Louisiana, and New Mexico. The trust is passive, has no employees, and does not operate the properties. It distributes cash received from the Net Profits Interest to its unitholders monthly.
sellsTo: Third-party crude oil and natural gas purchasers

exposures.sentence: The Net Profits Interest entitles the Trust to receive 80% of the net profits from the sale of oil and natural gas production from the Underlying Properties during the term of the Trust.
